description: Parent-facing flows for discovering programs, booking trial classes, and enrolling children. Supports both trial-first and direct enrollment paths.

screens.description: Public page listing all active programs with key details for parents to browse

features.description: Display all active programs with age group, schedule, pricing summary, and trial availability

requirements.description: Page displays all active programs as cards or list items showing: program name, age group, schedule summary, price, and whether trial is available
requirements.acceptance_criteria: All active programs appear; closed/draft programs do not; each card has a 'Book Trial' and/or 'Enroll Now' action button

requirements.description: Programs at capacity show a 'Full' indicator and disable the enroll button
requirements.acceptance_criteria: When enrollment count equals capacity, the 'Enroll Now' button is disabled and 'Full' label is shown

screens.description: Step-by-step form for parents to book a trial class

features.description: Parent selects program, enters child details, picks trial date, and submits

requirements.description: Form collects: parent name, email, phone, child name, child age, preferred trial date (from available dates)
requirements.acceptance_criteria: All fields are required; trial date picker shows only admin-defined trial-eligible dates with available capacity

requirements.description: If parent email matches an existing lead or parent record, pre-fill known fields
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Parent name, email, phone are pre-filled; parent can edit pre-filled values

requirements.description: On submission, system creates or updates a lead record with status 'Trial Scheduled'
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Lead record exists with correct status, child info, and selected trial date within 10 seconds of submission

requirements.description: On submission, parent receives a confirmation email with trial details and optional calendar invite
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Email is sent within 2 minutes of submission; email contains program name, date, time, and location

screens.description: Step-by-step form for parents to enroll a child directly in a program

features.description: Parent selects program, enters child details, sees price breakdown, applies coupon, and submits

requirements.description: Form collects: parent name, email, phone, child name, child age, optional coupon code
requirements.acceptance_criteria: All fields except coupon are required; form validates child age against program age group

requirements.description: Price breakdown displays before submission: base fee, registration fee (or waived), coupon discount, total
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Breakdown updates in real-time when coupon is applied; total matches calculated values

requirements.description: On submission, enrollment record is created with payment status 'pending'
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Enrollment record exists with correct program, child, pricing, and payment_status = 'pending'

requirements.description: Each enrollment is for exactly one child; parents with multiple children submit separate enrollment forms
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Form has fields for one child only; no multi-child selection is available

screens.description: Confirmation screen shown after successful enrollment with payment instructions

features.description: Display enrollment summary and Zelle payment instructions

requirements.description: Confirmation screen shows: enrollment summary (program, child, price breakdown) and Zelle payment instructions (recipient info, amount, reference)
requirements.acceptance_criteria: All enrollment details and payment instructions are visible; parent can screenshot or print the page

requirements.description: System sends a confirmation email with the same enrollment summary and payment instructions
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Email is sent within 2 minutes; content matches confirmation screen

business_rules.rule: Enrollment is blocked when program capacity is reached
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: When active enrollments equal program capacity, the enrollment form is unavailable and program shows 'Full'

business_rules.rule: Enrollment is blocked when the enrollment window is closed (past end date or manually closed by admin)
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: Closed programs show 'Enrollment Closed' and the enroll button is disabled

business_rules.rule: Admin can override capacity and enrollment window restrictions to manually add enrollments
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: Admin can enroll a child in a full or closed program from the admin panel

business_rules.rule: Trial booking creates or updates a lead record; direct enrollment also creates a lead if one doesn't exist
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: Every enrolled parent has a corresponding lead record with status 'Enrolled'

business_rules.rule: Child age is validated against the program's age group at enrollment time
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: If child age is outside the program's age range, enrollment form shows a warning; admin override is available

business_rules.rule: Admin can cancel an enrollment. Cancellation decrements the program enrollment count, updates payment status appropriately, and triggers a cancellation notification to the parent.
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: Cancelled enrollment is marked with status 'cancelled'; program capacity is released; parent receives cancellation email; cancellation is logged in lead activity timeline
